news.title: Mercor competitor Deccan AI raises $25M, sources experts from India
news.summary: Deccan AI concentrates its workforce in India to manage quality in a fast-growing but fragmented AI training market.

news.title: The AI skills gap is here, says AI company, and power users are pulling ahead
news.summary: Anthropic finds AI isn’t replacing jobs yet, but early data shows growing inequality as experienced users gain an edge, raising concerns about future displacement and workforce divides.

news.title: Google unveils TurboQuant, a new AI memory compression algorithm — and yes, the internet is calling it ‘Pied Piper’
news.summary: Google’s TurboQuant has the internet joking about Pied Piper from HBO's "Silicon Valley." The compression algorithm promises to shrink AI’s “working memory” by up to 6x, but it’s still just a lab expe

news.title: Melania Trump wants a robot to homeschool your child
news.summary: The first lady sees AI and robotics playing a prominent role in the future of American education.

news.title: Bernie Sanders and AOC propose a ban on data center construction
news.summary: Senator Bernie Sanders and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez introduced companion legislation to halt construction on new data centers until Congress passes comprehensive AI regulation.

news.title: Google launches Lyria 3 Pro music generation model
news.summary: Google is launching Lyria 3 Pro, an upgraded music model that generates longer, more customizable tracks, as it expands AI music tools across Gemini, enterprise products, and other services.

news.title: Reddit takes on the bots with new ‘human verification’ requirements for fishy behavior
news.summary: Reddit will require suspected automated accounts to verify they’re human, as it ramps up efforts to curb bot-driven spam and manipulation.
